title: Totem Counter
description: This mod adds a icon showing you how many totems you have left and is very usefull in pvp and crystal pvp.
body:
### This mod adds a totem counter which shows how many totems that you have left!

### This mod also adds settings to make it look perfect for each player.

- You can change between 7 different locations to have the totem counter on
- You can change when it has a different color when you are low on totems
- The mod also has a toggle to change if the counter shows when you have 0 totems
- It also has a setting to count the totem in your offhand or not

![Image showing a counter of totems over minecraft players hotbar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f03fc9545a1d7b4ed8252241a4ee361440b130a4.png)

If you need help or have any questions you can join the discord. I will try to be as active as possible!
